---
name: web-artifacts-builder
description: "Build standalone web artifacts and mini tools from requirements. Use when user asks to generate HTML/CSS/JS artifacts, interactive demos, lightweight microsites, or self-contained prototypes."
---

# Web Artifacts Builder

## When to use
- Create single-file or small multi-file web artifacts.
- Build quick interactive demos for ideas/features.
- Package clear, runnable UI artifacts for review.

## Procedure
1. Clarify artifact purpose, audience, and constraints.
2. Implement clean, runnable frontend artifact code.
3. Keep structure maintainable and easy to iterate.
4. Provide output that is directly usable in browser/workspace.
